Backend Engineer (Node.js) — Hyderabad (hybrid)

We're scaling our payments platform and need a backend engineer comfortable working in Node.js + TypeScript across a microservices architecture.

Required:
- 3+ years of Node.js experience
- TypeScript proficiency
- Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis
- Strong understanding of REST API design
- Experience with Git workflows

Preferred:
- Kafka or other event streaming
- Kubernetes
- Experience with payments, fintech, or high-throughput systems
- Familiarity with Prometheus / Grafana

Location: Hyderabad (3 days in-office)
